name: safety-hub
description: - Node.js with Express.js - React - Radix UI - PostgreSQL - Prisma - Docker

scripts.dev: docker compose exec workspace sh -lc "npm run dev:workspace"
scripts.dev:workspace: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.db-shell: docker compose exec db psql -U safetyhub -d safetyhub
scripts.db-studio: docker compose exec workspace sh -lc "cd backend && npx prisma studio --browser none --port 5555"
scripts.hash-gen: docker compose exec workspace sh -lc "cd backend && npx ts-node src/util/hash-gen.ts"
